page.content: In the analysis of Same-Property NOI growth from 2019 to 2024 for Digital Realty Trust, the Year 2019 recorded a Same-Property NOI of CHF120M with a Growth Rate of 5.2%.

lines.text: In the analysis of Same-Property NOI growth from 2019 to 2024 for Digital Realty Trust, the Year 2019 recorded a Same-
Property NOI of CHF120M with a Growth Rate of 5.2%.

page.content: In 2020, the Same-Property NOI increased to CHF125M, reflecting a Growth Rate of 4.2%. The Average Growth for the period leading up to 2021 was CHF122.5M with a Growth Rate of 4.7%. By 2022, the Same-Property NOI rose to CHF130M, achieving a Growth Rate of 6.0%. In 2023, the Same-Property NOI further increased to CHF135M, marking a Growth Rate of 3.8%, while 2024 is projected to have a Same-Property NOI of CHF140M and a Growth Rate of 4.3%, culminating in a Total Growth of CHF145M at a 3.6% rate. The Average NOI stands at CHF132.5M with an Average Growth Rate of 4.4%, categorized as Moderate, Stable, Consistent, Moderate, Slight, and Increasing in Growth Trend, with an Overall Status of Positive Outlook, Stable, and Projected Growth. In the Tenant Industry diversification, the Technology sector contributed CHF50M in 2019 with a Market Share of 24.0%, while Financial Services yielded CHF40M.

page.content: The subsequent years saw Technology grow to CHF70M by 2023 with a Market Share decrease to 18.0% and Financial Services reaching CHF52M with a Market Share of 14.0%, resulting in Total Revenue of CHF122M in 2023.
